headline: GEHC Wins FDA 510(k) Approval for View, Enhances Radiology Workflows
summary: GE HealthCare wins FDA 510(k) clearance for View, a cloud-native imaging viewer in Genesis Radiology Workspace aimed at improving radiology workflows.
